candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; large positive amounts and clearly labeled as total revenue.
Small balancing/adjustment line related to revenues; used as backup if main Total Revenue label changes or is missing for some years.
Cost line, not revenue; included only because of generic candidate list but not appropriate for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue; inappropriate for REVT.
Interest income is financial, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income / loss for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the main operating revenue line 'Total Revenue' with 'Revenues' as a secondary backup label in case of label changes over time.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales; best match for COGS.
Mostly operating overhead (personnel) rather than direct COGS; not chosen for COGS.
Mixed operating overhead; not purely COGS.
Explicit SG&A; overhead, not COGS.
R&D, not COGS.
Financial result, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Supplemental disclosure, part of overhead, not the main COGS line.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense.
Liability, not expense line.

variables.notes: Used the clearly labeled direct cost line 'Cost of sales' as COGS.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead costs; a core SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component (excluding totals).
Explicit SG&A line; include as a component per instructions.
Likely minor additional operating overhead; acceptable as SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization (a D&A item) which should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: Included multiple operating overhead components (personnel, other operating expenses, explicit SG&A, and other operating) while excluding the amortization line, which is D&A and should not be part of XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; primary choice for XRD.
Alternative R&D label likely used in other years; good secondary choice.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization of capitalized R&D; related but more D&A in nature. Kept as tertiary backup if explicit R&D expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D; less central than the main R&D expense line.
Capitalized R&D asset, not the period expense; not selected for XRD.
Accumulated amortization of development costs (balance sheet), not the period expense line.
Gross capitalized development cost; not the expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Mapped to explicit R&D expense labels, with a supplemental amortization line as a tertiary backup if the main R&D lines are missing for some years.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.
Interest on mortgage loans; possible component but appears unused (all nan).
Other interest expense; good secondary choice if main interest expenses line is missing.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.
Equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant interest expense component and good tertiary backup.
Aggregate interest expense label; suitable backup if populated in some periods.
Debt balance, not expense.
Liability for accrued interest, not the expense line itself.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Too generic and appears unused; less reliable than explicit P&L interest expense lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of explicit interest expense-related income statement lines, starting with the main 'Interest expenses' line and using other specific interest expense labels as fallbacks.

candidates.why: Relates to equity-accounted affiliates, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity owned by the shareholders in the parent company
candidates.why: Equity attributable to owners of the parent; ideal for BE as it excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests; only used if parent-only equity were absent.
Technical balancing line, not a primary financial statement caption.
Technical balancing line, not primary equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line for the statement; not BE.
Total assets/LI+E control total; not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity owned by the shareholders in the parent company

variables.notes: Used equity attributable to shareholders of the parent to avoid double counting non-controlling interests, which are mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation to non-controlling interests; conceptually minority interest but P&L based.
Duplicate P&L allocation line labeled as minority interests.
P&L comprehensive income allocation; again conceptually minorities but not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet line for minority equity interests; primary choice for MIB.
Alternative label for the same minority equity interest; good secondary choice.
